name: Riemannian Metric & Curvature
description: g Riemannian metric. Riemann curvature R, Ricci, scalar. Sectional curvature. Gauss–Bonnet.

graph TD
    D1["Def: Riemannian g\npos def on T_p"]
    D2["Def: Levi-Civita\nunique metric conn"]

    T1["Thm: Levi-Civita exists\n∇g=0, torsion-free"]
    T2["Thm: Ricci, scalar\nRic, R from R"]
